name: webde-access
description: Private full-access WEB.DE mailbox connector for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Read, manage, draft, and send WEB.DE mail from Codex.
interface.longDescription: Adds private WEB.DE mailbox access through IMAP and SMTP, including mailbox listing, message search and reading, attachment download, message management, drafts, sending, replies, and forwarding.
defaultPrompt: Search my WEB.DE inbox for unread messages from today.
Read the latest WEB.DE email from my client and draft a reply.
Send this file as an attachment from my WEB.DE account.
